# Relocamp

> Interactive trip planner for campervan relocation deals across Europe

Relocamp is a free web app that lets you plan multi-leg campervan relocation trips on an interactive map. Campervan rental companies need vehicles moved between cities, so they offer them to travellers for 1-5 EUR/day. Relocamp shows these deals on a map and lets you chain them into multi-leg road trips.

## Features
- Interactive map of live campervan relocation deals across Europe
- Multi-leg trip builder — chain deals into a full road trip
- Total cost and date calculator
- Nearby city discovery when no direct deals exist
- Deals from 1 EUR/day with bed, kitchen, and insurance included

## How it works
1. Enter your starting city
2. See all available campervan relocation deals as routes on the map
3. Pick a deal and add it to your trip
4. Continue from your destination to find connecting deals
5. Build a complete multi-leg road trip across Europe

## Links
- Trip Planner: https://relocamp.vercel.app
- Deal Search: https://movacamper.com
- Contact: hello@movacamper.com
